data.body:
Depends on the economic cycle.  

Counter-cyclical stimulus & safety net programs are generally non-inflationary as natural interest rates approach the zero lower bound.

Stimulus during periods of strong growth is inflationary, but can be counter-acted with higher taxes and lower deficits.
